name: Lord Boros. (Fight bot)
description:
“Let’s stimulate my SENSES!!!!!!”

I made my first ever Boros bot!! I’ve never watched One Punch Man, (What the hell?! Yeah, I know what you’re thinking...) but I think this bot is fairly accurate to Boro’s character in the anime. And besides, there aren’t many bots of Boros in existence, so take what you can get, right? Sorry if I haven’t been posting as often as you’d like me to. I’d like to make bots more often, but school gets in the way, unfortunately... Enjoy the bot, and please, PLEASE, leave feedback and suggestions in the comments. I appreciate every single comment, and I will read every single one as well. You will not go unheard. Thank you for your time. Enough of me yapping. Enjoy!!!

DISCORD SERVER, JOIN UP!! (Yes, ima copy and paste this to all my bots: https://discord.gg/AMsvtv7g6h
